results.title: Tandem: Language exchange - Apps on Google Play
highlights:
Tandem: Language exchange - Apps on Google Play
[...]
# Tandem: Language exchange
[...]
Practice a language with native speakers and take it to the next level.Whether you’re aiming to learn a new language or improve fluency in one you already know, having engaging conversations with an exchange partner makes all the difference. You can even learn a language with international friends while expanding your skills and cultural understanding.Whatever your language goal is—language learning for travel, business, or personal growth—you can reach it while meeting new people and making friends around the globe. It’s easy: just choose a language you want to learn, find a Tandem member with similar interests, and you’re ready to go!Once you’re connected, the real fun begins! Learn from each other, practice speaking, and find fluency faster through conversation practice! Text, call, or even video chat—communication with your language exchange partner is as flexible as you need it to be. It’s the perfect way to meet people and improve your language skills at the same time.With Tandem, you can learn languages through 1-to-1 chats or with Parties, the ultimate group learning audio space. There are millions of Tandem members waiting for you, so find your people and start speaking their language today!Choose from over 300 languages:- Spanish 🇪🇸🇲🇽- English 🇬🇧🇺🇸- Japanese 🇯🇵- Korean 🇰🇷- German 🇩🇪,- Italian 🇮🇹- Portuguese 🇵🇹🇧🇷- Simplified and Traditional Chinese 🇨🇳🇹🇼- 12 different sign languages, including American Sign Language.DOWNLOAD TANDEM AND LEARN A LANGUAGE NOW!Tandem unites people across borders through language learning. Whether you’re looking to make international friends, talk to strangers, or connect with others who are passionate about languages, Tandem has it all.BETTER VOCABSkip the tricky grammar tests and random phrases. Tandem allows you to focus on meaningful conversation practice, centered around topics you care about.PERFECT PRONUNCIATIONWant to sound like a native speaker? One way to help is to practice a language with your exchange partner until you’ve mastered every word and phrase.SOUND LIKE A LOCALPractice a language with voice notes, audio, and video chats until you sound like a native speaker. No matter If you’re looking for tips on pronunciation or want to speak more casually in your fluency.MAKE INTERNATIONAL FRIENDSTandem connects you with international friends who share your passion for language learning. You’ll not only practice speaking, but also gain insights into various cultures. IMMERSIVE GROUP LEARNINGExperience group learning like never before with Tandem’s interactive Parties! Use them to practice a language by listening in on group conversations or take the lead and start your own language Party.GRAMMAR TIPS & TRICKSUse translation features and text corrections to master grammar from the first try, whether you are perfecting everyday speech or understanding formal speech.App Access Permissions:Optional permissions:- Location information: Required to use the Nearby feature to see members near you, the Travel feature to show members around the world and to add an approximate location to your profile.- Microphone: Required for sending audio messages, making audio and video calls, and joining Language Parties.- Camera: Required for taking photos to upload to your profile or post in a Language Club, take and send a photo in a chat, video calling, and scanning QR codes.- Notifications: Used to send you notifications about acceptance into the community, new messages, new followers and their posts, new references and marketing communication.- Nearby devices: Bluetooth access is required to connect audio devices during a call or Language Party.You can still use Tandem without granting optional permissions, except features where their nature requires the respective permission, like a video call requiring camera permission.Got a question? Contact us on support@tandem.net

highlights:
‎HelloTalk - Language Learning App - App Store 

# HelloTalk - Language Learning
[...]
Practice languages with native speakers on HelloTalk! We recently introduced HelloTalk Live and Voiceroom - interactive language and culture events to help you master languages through the content you love! HelloTalk, the original language exchange app, connects you with native speakers to practice languages (English, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, Mandarin Chinese, Portuguese, German, Italian, Russian, Arabic, Turkish, Hindi, Indonesian, Thai, Vietnamese and 260+ more) for FREE! HelloTalk equips you with learning tools such as translation and instant captions so you can learn by chatting with native speakers. Learn languages from locals around the world through livestreams and Voicerooms. Connect with expert hosts to discuss interesting topics with language partners in the learning community! Why HelloTalk? ► Real language learning atmosphere Whether you're focused on a widely spoken language or a less common one, HelloTalk caters to your needs. The system smartly matches you based on your native language and proficiency, while allowing you to filter ideal language partners according to various criteria such as age, location, and gender. Plus, with built-in translation and transliteration tools, you can communicate confidently without any language barriers. ► A powerful tool for sharpening your language skills Acquiring new words through conversations with native speakers is more effective than rigid memorization. Whether you're a student preparing for exams like the CET, GRE, TOEFL, IELTS, planning to study abroad, or a professional seeking career advancement through language skills, HelloTalk offers native speakers who match your proficiency level for engaging interactions and valuable learning experiences. ► Immersive multi-person language chat rooms If you choose to learn Spanish, for example, every Voiceroom you enter on HelloTalk gathers Spanish learners and Spanish native speakers from around the world to discuss interesting topics. Here, only your voice needs to be heard, creating a comfortable, introvert-friendly atmosphere. Here, sharing mutual interests allows everyone to freely express themselves and share personal experiences, fostering both language intuition and authentic expression skills. It's incredibly addictive! ► Diverse global Livestreams HelloTalk features handpicked foreign language hosts who offer online video lessons, share language insights, and provide glimpses into their lives abroad. You can even join them on stage for one-on-one video conversations with fellow language learners. Whether you're grappling with pronunciation, speaking speed, or shyness, these hosts will assist you in refining your language skills and guiding the conversation. For rapid improvement in spoken language, there's no substitute for direct communication with native speakers! ► International Moments HelloTalk's Moments offers real-time posts covering learning, lifestyle, and cultural insights from around the world. It's your ticket to discovering fresh perspectives and gaining deeper insights into diverse cultural customs, all from the comfort of your home. Don't forget to engage with posts that catch your interest! What the world is saying about HelloTalk “One of the best apps to help you learn a new language.” - 9to5Mac "When you're ready to experiment with a foreign language, HelloTalk provides an excellent opportunity for interaction with other speakers." –PCMag START PRACTICING LANGUAGES RIGHT AWAY!!! HelloTalk, also abbreviated as HT, is a language exchange app and website released in 2013. It is monetized using the freemium model. It was created by Chinese developer Zackery Ngai. # Hilokal: Language Exchange App

Learn a new language like Korean or English with Hilokal—your AI language tutor paired with the opportunity to practice with an active community of 1.5 million real language learners worldwide. [Real-Time Language Mastery] • Receive immediate corrections on grammar, pronunciation, and vocabulary, ensuring you sound like a local and grasp nuanced expressions. ▶ Learning Tools ◀ [Interactive Transcripts with Insights] • Record your learning sessions to get text and audio transcripts; analyze your pronunciation with heat maps and leverage AI insights for targeted improvement. [Word Tracking & Analysis] • Monitor every word you speak, analyze pronunciation accuracy, and review your speaking speed. [Performance Leaderboards] • Compare your language progress with others on a weekly leaderboard to motivate and enhance your learning experience. ▶ Community-Driven Language Practice ◀ [Language Exchange] • Connect with over 1.5 million users learners worldwide, practicing and refining your language skills through real conversations. [Interactive Language Games & Themed Chats] • Engage in fun games and themed chats about popular topics like K-pop, travel, or international cinema, enhancing your language skills in a context you love. [Community-Led Sessions] • Participate in sessions led by experienced speakers and tailored to all skill levels—from beginners to advanced learners. [Instant Audio Chat Rooms] • Jump into audio chat rooms at any time, perfect for spontaneous practice sessions with native speakers and fellow language enthusiasts. ▶ Subscription Options ◀ [Access Full Features with Subscription] • Start with a 7-day free trial and continue your language learning journey with our Premium Plus subscription for full access to AI features and community interactions. [Exclusive Subscriber Benefits] • Enjoy advanced learning materials, detailed analytics, and personalized feedback to accelerate your path to language proficiency. Hilokal isn’t just an app—it’s your gateway to global fluency. Embrace a new language with tools designed for young adults seeking career growth, cultural immersion, and personal connections. results.author: JSNRXBRTS
highlights:
‎Slowly: Make Global Friends App - App Store 

# Slowly: Make Global Friends
[...]
Slowly: Build Authentic Friendships at Your Own Pace "In a world dominated by instant messaging, meaningful connections have become a rare luxury." Slowly reimagines the art of correspondence, offering a unique way to make friends. Connect with penpals around the world and explore the beauty of cultural and linguistic exchange through thoughtfully written letters. Rediscover the joy of anticipation and dive into heartfelt, written conversations. Designed for those who prefer to take their time and focus on genuine connections, Slowly brings back the charm of traditional penpals. Each letter takes time to arrive—anywhere from a few hours to a few days—depending on the distance between you and your new friend. Whether you’re looking for foreign friends, a language exchange partner, or simply a quiet space to write a meaningful letter, Slowly is here for you. Key Features: ► Distance-Based Letter Delivery Each letter travels at a speed that reflects the physical distance between you and your friend, creating a sense of anticipation. With no pressure to respond instantly, you have time to reflect, compose your thoughts, and share your story. This slower pace nurtures deeper and more meaningful connections. ► Collect Over 2,000 Unique Stamps Turn every letter into an adventure by collecting unique regional stamps from across the globe. These stamps add a personal and cultural touch to your correspondence, serving as reminders of the friendships you create. ► A Safe and Secure Space for Everyone No photos, no real names—just your thoughts, shared in a secure and stress-free environment. Whether you're an introvert looking for deeper conversations or someone who values privacy, Slowly offers a safe place to express yourself and connect authentically. ► Unlimited Letters, Always Free Enjoy the art of writing without limits—send and receive as many letters as you like, completely free. Optional premium features are available to enhance your experience and meet your unique needs. Who Is Slowly For? - Anyone looking to make friends at their own pace, free from the rush of instant communication. - Language learners seeking partners for meaningful language exchange. - People who love writing letters and want to explore different cultures. - Introverts and thoughtful individuals who prefer calm, meaningful interactions. - Anyone hoping to meet new friends from all over the world. Slowly: Authentic Friendships, at Your Speed. Whether you’re looking to reconnect with the joy of letter writing, discover new perspectives, or simply build friendships that matter, Slowly is your perfect companion for creating meaningful connections in a fast-paced world. Terms of Service: https://slowly.app/terms/

# Pie: Free Events, Cool People
[...]
NOW HANGING IN CHICAGO, AUSTIN, BAY AREA AND COLUMBUS Not in one of these cities? Sit tight—we’ll get to you soon. Or move here. Your call. Hi, we’re Pie, a social app that helps you get a life. We wanna live in a world where finding things you like to do with people you enjoy is as easy as calling an Uber…so we’re building it. The two main pieces of our Pie (we had to): Things You Like To Do Free local, IRL, actually-fun events that match your vibe. Think: DJ in a coffee shop, Sunday Morning Club, and Pop Culture Jeopardy. People You Enjoy Interesting, like-minded, actually-fun people you run into so many times that you accidentally become best friends. No pressure, no promises. Other Ways Pie helps you Get a Life™ • A Personalized Feed: See what your friends and friends-of-friends are up to and who’s going to what. • In-App Chat: Say hi, share photos, and make plans with all your new friends. • Event Hosting: Create a private event or open it up to your friends’ network using snowball mode. (And duh, you can share the hang directly from the app via link, text, or airdrop.) • Calendar Sync: Add events directly to your calendar so you can stay organized and curb your FOMO. Have feedback for us? Send it our way at support@getpie.app
[...]

# Timeleft: Make New Friends IRL
[...]
Meet New People & Make Friends
[...]
The friendship app 3M+ users love. Timeleft matches you for dinners, drinks, coffee, and runs with like-minded people. No swiping. No planning. Just show up. ▶ HOW IT WORKS ◀ 1. Take the quiz We match you based on personality, not selfies. 2. Book your experience Dinner, drinks, coffee, or a run. Pick your vibe and your neighborhood. 3. Get matched The day of, we reveal your venue and a preview of who you'll meet. 4. Show up & connect Meet your table, skip the small talk, and start building friendships. ▶ FORMATS ◀ Dinners. Every Wednesday with groups of 4-6. Women-Only Dinners. Every Tuesday at 7pm. Timeleft Run. Group runs followed by coffee. Timeleft Coffee. Casual Saturday afternoons. Last Drinks. At a surprise bar after dinner (select cities). ▶ FEATURES ◀ Choose your vibe Join regular Dinners every Wednesday, or Women-Only Dinners on Tuesdays. For something more casual, try Saturday Coffee, low-cost (high-vibe) Drinks, or weekly Runs. In select cities, keep the night going with drinks at a surprise bar after dinner. Curated, not random We match you based on personality, shared interests, and age, creating groups of 4-6 that feel intimate but not awkward. No swiping through profiles. No bios. Just thoughtfully matched tables and curated restaurants for every dietary type. Make it a ritual The first meetup creates a moment, showing up again creates momentum. Use Repeat to invite a connection to your next event, or just keep booking weekly with one-tap rebooking. Consistency turns strangers into friends, and friends into bffs. Stay connected Met someone great? With Connect you can stay in touch with people you clicked with. Bring +1 and watch your social circles expand naturally. And at every table, in-app icebreakers help you skip the small talk and get straight to the good stuff. Thoughtfully designed Live Activity countdowns on your lockscreen before an event. Revamped profile features. Improved onboarding. A completely refreshed app experience. We've made everything smoother, because making friends shouldn't feel like work. Join the movement 3M+ users. 250+ cities. 52 countries. 4.7+ rated on iOS. Women-only dinners available in 50+ cities. This is the friendship app people actually use, and love. Social Media For Gaming

Pax is a social gaming app where you can play 15 different games solo against AI or head-to-head with real players — with live voice chat! Single Player Games: Tic-Tac-Toe (3x3 & 5x5), Flood-It, Minesweeper, Same Game, Sudoku, Mastermind, Fifteen Puzzle, Nonogram, Peg Solitaire, Light Up, Flip, Unruly, Bridges, and Loopy. results.title: Breeze: Can a Dutch app save Brits from swiping past our dismal dating scene? | The Independent
highlights:
The Dutch couple are one of many success stories spawning from the dating app Breeze, which launched in Europe in 2020 before landing in London in 2025. Breeze promises date nights without endless swiping, and banishes the talking stage (what’s your favourite colour? How many siblings do you have?”) by only opening the chat window two hours before the date. When you match with someone, you put your availability into the app and it books you both a table at one of its partner bars. You each pay £9.50 for a “date token” that covers your first drink. Anyone who cancels is frozen out of the app for a week.
[...]
Breeze was launched by a group of university students as the answer to modern dating’s most irking issues: ghosting, becoming pen pals, and endless options (the app only sends you a limited number of potential matches each day at 7pm). In the Netherlands, where it’s the fastest-growing and third most popular dating app, behind Bumble and Tinder, it’s evidently working – but can it save Britain’s dismal dating scene?
[...]
Still, even the biggest Breeze enthusiast concede that there are some issues with the app. Principally, its choice of locations which seem to be slightly worse in the UK than in Western Europe. While Ruben and Liv met at a “really cute wine bar” near the historic harbour in Rotterdam, Mark suffered through his first three initial Breeze dates spent at the same “very odd” Chelsea bar that “felt like a Sixties sex dungeon”. “Not my vibe,” he says, adding the app sends multiple other first-date couples to the same location, which leaves you feeling like you’re in the First Dates restaurant, though the eavesdropping is great.
[...]
There are certain things Breeze can save Brits from: boring convos generated by ChatGPT? Yes. Being strung along for weeks with no actual date follow-through? Yes. Last-minute cancellations? Less likely but, ultimately, no. And what it absolutely can’t save the nation from is ourselves. Riding the rejection roller coaster of the dating landscape is undeniably knackering – and if fatigue starts to be felt, then the best remedy is to give it all a rest.
[...]
But Becky admits Breeze has a fundamentally good design, if you can shake off your apathy. So far, the platform has organised 752,208 dates, with 19 of them leading to the couple starting a family. “It’s definitely better than constantly swiping on Tinder or Hinge,” she says. “It felt way more intentional. Which I really liked… But the dates themselves just made me realise that I’m not really bothered by dating at all at the moment. Still, it’s a nice option. There are always freaks out there – but I’d be up for trying it again when I’m in the right frame of mind.”

If you have Googled "best language exchange app," you have seen the same two names everywhere: HelloTalk and Tandem. They look similar. They promise similar things. And choosing between them is genuinely confusing.
[...]
HelloTalk is built around text-based learning. It has a social feed (Moments), translation tools, and correction features baked into the chat. Think of it as a language learning tool with a social layer.
[...]
Tandem is built around speaking. It has video calls, voice notes, and a tutor marketplace. Think of it as a conversation-first app with learning tools on the side.
[...]
Both let you find partners by language
[...]
and send messages
[...]
free. The difference is in what
[...]
optimize for.

HelloTalk wins. For most language pairs, HelloTalk simply has more users. Search for Japanese speakers learning English and you will find hundreds of active profiles. On Tandem, the same search returns fewer results, especially outside major languages.
[...]
Verdict: Tandem produces better individual conversations. HelloTalk
[...]
conversations overall. Pick

Verdict: HelloTalk is more generous with free features. Tandem's free tier feels restrictive and pushes you toward paying.
[...]
Neither HelloTalk nor Tandem has a "find someone near me" feature that is designed around meeting up. They are global chat platforms. Great
[...]
connecting with someone in Brazil while you sit in Tokyo. Less great for finding a conversation partner you can grab coffee with this Saturday.
[...]
This is exactly the gap SewaYou fills. It is a map-based friendship app where you see people on a map, whether they are in your neighborhood or on the other side of the world. When someone is nearby, you meet up. When they are far, you chat. Language exchange happens naturally because you are having real conversations with real people, not drilling each other through a screen.
[...]
If you are tired of online-only exchanges that never leave the chat window, try SewaYou. It is not a replacement for HelloTalk or Tandem. It is the missing piece: the part where you actually meet someone.
[...]
Choose SewaYou if:

- You learn better through genuine conversation than structured drills
- You want a map view that shows you real people, not just a list of profiles
- You are tired of online-only exchanges that never leave the chat
[...]
Is HelloTalk or Tandem better for Japanese? HelloTalk has more Japanese users overall. But if you are physically in Japan, SewaYou connects you with Japanese speakers nearby for in-person practice, which is more effective than either.

Are HelloTalk and Tandem free? Both have free tiers. HelloTalk's free version is more usable. Tandem's free tier limits daily messages, which can be frustrating.

What about italki? italki is a paid tutoring marketplace, not a free language exchange. It is excellent for structured lessons with professional teachers, but it is a different product entirely. You can use it alongside HelloTalk/Tandem/SewaYou without overlap.
